testcase.name: US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-1: Dashboard loads at /dashboard/shipper
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-4: All four content sections are present
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-6: Grid alignment at 1280px (8-4 split)
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-6: Grid stacking at 768px (responsive)
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-6: Grid stacking at 375px (mobile layout)
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-7: All sections use .panel class
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-8: Skeleton heights prevent layout jitter
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-9: Grid alignment is visually correct (no overflow/gaps)
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-5: Keyboard navigation works (tab through regions)
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › AC-5: Screen reader announces regions correctly
US-823: Shipper Dashboard Grid Layout › No errors in browser console
